lesson.menu_desc: Dialogue + giving your opinion in a meeting with David and the team -- I think, I agree, I disagree, in my opinion -- 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 19 -- In the Meeting -- Giving Your Opinion in English
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 19 -- In the Meeting

listenings.text: Hi Maisa, this is David. Let me tell you about the meeting today. I think our plan is good. But in my opinion, the budget is a little high. I agree with the team about the deadline. It is a good point. We had three points on the agenda, and it was a short meeting. Lets move on and start next week. Thank you!

Hello, this is Sarah from the office. Here is a short summary of the meeting. We had three points on the agenda. First, the budget. I think it is fine. Second, the deadline. I agree with David, it is a good point. Third, the new client. In my opinion, this is great news. Lets move on and work on it next week. Have a nice day!

extra_audio.text: Good morning, everyone. Lets start the meeting. I think we should look at the budget first. In my opinion, the plan is good. Lets move on to the next point.
